Description: Verify that a user can login with valid email and password
Steps:
1. Go to login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click login
Expected Result: User should be redirected to dashboard

Description: Verify that login fails with incorrect password
Steps:
1. Go to login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter invalid password
4. Click login
1. Login to app\n2. Click logout button
Expected Result: User should be redirected to landing page

Expected Result: Password reset email should be sent
